description_long: This is a modern, single-story bungalow with a flat roof and a minimalist rectangular form. The exterior features a combination of dark cladding and large floor-to-ceiling glass windows, providing ample natural light and a seamless connection between indoor and outdoor spaces. A prominent feature is the expansive swimming pool that runs parallel to the main living area, bordered by a deck with lounge chairs and landscaping elements such as small trees. The entrance is defined by a covered walkway and a set of steps leading up to the main door, while the rear and side facades are characterized by clean lines and a mix of solid and transparent surfaces. The building sits slightly elevated above ground level, with visible support structures beneath the pool area. The overall design emphasizes openness, simplicity, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A sleek, modern bungalow with a flat roof, large glass windows, and an elongated swimming pool alongside a spacious deck. The structure features dark cladding, minimalist lines, and a blend of open and private spaces.
description_view_0: This view highlights the main entrance with a covered walkway, steps, and a glimpse of the interior through large windows.
description_view_1: The side view shows the solid dark cladding, minimal window openings, and the pool area extending from the rear.
description_view_2: The rear view showcases the full length of the swimming pool, extensive glass facade, and outdoor lounge area.
description_view_3: This side view emphasizes the pool's edge, the transparent glass wall, and the elevated structure with visible supports.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large floor-to-ceiling windows and grouped glass panels
